message:
feat(fp-frame): add Series conditional/membership methods (where_cond, mask, isin, between)

Implement four new pandas-compatible Series methods with index-aligned
semantics and comprehensive test coverage:

- where_cond(cond, other): keep values where condition is True, replace others
  with `other` (or NaN). Aligns self and cond via outer-index union before
  masking. Null conditions produce NaN. Matches pandas series.where().

- mask(cond, other): inverse of where — replace values where condition IS True.
  Same alignment and null-propagation semantics. Matches pandas series.mask().

- isin(test_values): returns boolean Series indicating membership. Handles
  NaN-in-values (NaN.isin([NaN]) returns True), cross-type numeric comparison
  (Int64 vs Float64), and string membership. Matches pandas series.isin().

- between(left, right, inclusive): range test with four boundary modes
  ("both", "neither", "left", "right"). Null elements produce false. Works
  across Int64/Float64 via to_f64 coercion. Matches pandas series.between().

Tests: 13 new tests covering basic behavior, boundary conditions, null
propagation, cross-type comparisons, and float ranges for all four methods.

Also regenerates compat closure attestation artifacts with updated timestamps
and recalculated SHA-256 signatures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
